attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
TVOUTPUT.ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCR, 
TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
TVOUTPUT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
TVOUTPUT.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,
TVOUTPUT.DV_MAINT_NET_LOCAL_TOTAL_AMT,
TVOUTPUT.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,
TVOUTPUT.SALES_MOTION_CD,
TVOUTPUT.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
TVOUTPUT.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
TVOUTPUT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
TVOUTPUT.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
case when NTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL and NTV.SALES_MOTION_CD IS NOT NULL and NTV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT IS NOT NULL 
AND  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,TVOUTPUT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,TVOUTPUT.SALES_MOTION_CD
ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM ASC)  = 1 
then NTV.DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM ELSE TVOUTPUT.DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM END as DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM,
COALESCE (MAX (TVOUTPUT.DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER (PARTITION BY
TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,TVOUTPUT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,TVOUTPUT.SALES_MOTION_CD  ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM ASC ROWS
BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING),timestamp'3500-01-01 00:00:00') AS DV_EXPIRATION_DTM  ,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,TVOUTPUT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,TVOUTPUT.SALES_MOTION_CD  ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM ASC) AS RANK_INDEX,
(CASE  WHEN  RANK_INDEX=1 AND NTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL AND NTV.SALES_MOTION_CD IS NOT NULL AND NTV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 'U'
        ELSE  'I'  END ) AS DML_TYPE,
TVOUTPUT.SK_SQ_SOL_ALLOC_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
TVOUTPUT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT,
TVOUTPUT.AS_TS_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME, 
TVOUTPUT.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID, 
TVOUTPUT.ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.REASON_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
TVOUTPUT.COMMENTS,
TVOUTPUT.CASE_NUMBER,
TVOUTPUT.USER_ID 	
FROM  
(
SELECT 
TVINPUT.ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCR, 
TVINPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
TVINPUT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT, 
TVINPUT.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM, 
TVINPUT.DV_MAINT_NET_LOCAL_TOTAL_AMT, 
TVINPUT.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT ,
TVINPUT.SALES_MOTION_CD,
TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_USER,
TVINPUT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
TVINPUT.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
TVINPUT.DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY 
TVINPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,TVINPUT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,TVINPUT.SALES_MOTION_CD,TVINPUT.DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM
ORDER BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DTM  DESC)  AS ROW_NUM,
TVINPUT.SK_SQ_SOL_ALLOC_KEY,
TVINPUT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
TVINPUT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT,
TVINPUT.AS_TS_CODE,
TVINPUT.AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME, 
TVINPUT.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID, 
TVINPUT.ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
TVINPUT.REASON_CODE,
TVINPUT.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
TVINPUT.COMMENTS,
TVINPUT.CASE_NUMBER,
TVINPUT.USER_ID  				
FROM 
( 
SELECT 
WI.ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCR, 
WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
WI.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
WI.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,
WI.DV_MAINT_NET_LOCAL_TOTAL_AMT,
WI.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,
WI.SALES_MOTION_CD,
WI.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
WI.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
WI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
WI.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
WI.DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM,
SM.SK_SQ_SOL_ALLOC_KEY AS SK_SQ_SOL_ALLOC_KEY,
WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
WI.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT,
WI.AS_TS_FLG AS AS_TS_CODE, 
WI.AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
WI.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID,  
WI.ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
WI.REASON_CODE,
WI.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
WI.COMMENTS,
WI.CASE_NUMBER,
WI.USER_ID   
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_SUMMARY_QUOTE_SMC_4 WI 
INNER JOIN
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SUMMARY_QUOTE_SOL_ALLOC SM
ON 
WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=SM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AND
WI.SALES_MOTION_CD=SM.SALES_MOTION_CD AND
WI.DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM=SM.DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM AND
WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=SM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
UNION 
SELECT 
SMC.ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCR, 
SMC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
SMC.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
SMC.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,
SMC.DV_MAINT_NET_LOCAL_TOTAL_AMT,
SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,
SMC.SALES_MOTION_CD,
SMC.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
SMC.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
SMC.EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
SMC.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
SMC.DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM,
SMC.SK_SQ_SOL_ALLOC_KEY,
SMC.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
SMC.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT,
SMC.AS_TS_CODE,
SMC.AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME, 
SMC.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID, 
SMC.ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
SMC.REASON_CODE,
SMC.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
SMC.COMMENTS,
SMC.CASE_NUMBER,
SMC.USER_ID  
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SUMMARY_QUOTE_SOL_ALLOC SMC where DV_EXPIRATION_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
AND (SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,SALES_MOTION_CD) in 
(SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,SALES_MOTION_CD 
from $$STGDB.WI_SUMMARY_QUOTE_SMC_4) 
) TVINPUT 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,TVINPUT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,TVINPUT.SALES_MOTION_CD ,TVINPUT.DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM
							ORDER BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1
						
) TVOUTPUT 

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SUMMARY_QUOTE_SOL_ALLOC NTV 
	ON TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
	AND TVOUTPUT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=NTV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
	AND TVOUTPUT.SALES_MOTION_CD=NTV.SALES_MOTION_CD
	AND NTV.DV_EXPIRATION_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'  where TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1
